intended_use: The Bruker Daltonics, Inc MALDI Biotyper CA System is a qualitative in vitro diagnostic mass spectrometer system for the identification of Gram-negative bacterial colonies cultured from human specimen
intended_use_full: The Bruker Daltonics, Inc MALDI Biotyper CA System is a qualitative in vitro diagnostic mass spectrometer system for the identification of Gram-negative bacterial colonies cultured from human specimens using matrix-assisted laser desorption/ionization - time of flight (MALDI-TOF) mass spectrometry technology. The MALDI Biotyper CA System is indicated for use in conjunction with other clinical and laboratory findings to aid in the diagnosis of Gram negative bacterial infections.
ground_truth: Manufacturer's reference database (MALDI Biotyper for Clinical Applications - MBT-CA) containing known Gram-negative bacterial species spectra; predicate device (Vitek® MS) for substantial equivalency comparison
other_metrics: Precision/repeatability: 86.1%-100% identification success via direct transfer method across 10 test organisms; 100% success with extraction method. High-confidence identifications (log(score) ≥2.00) achieved in 100% of samples after extraction procedure. Dynamic range established: Direct Transfer 6.3x10³–1.4x10⁴ to 1.4x10⁶–≥6.5x10⁷ cells/µL; Extraction 9.0x10³–1.3x10⁵ to 1.1x10⁷–≥6.9x10⁷ cells/µL. Specificity study: 0 false identifications across 18 non-targeted organisms (anaerobes, mycobacteria, gram-positive bacteria, yeast species). Mixed culture study: 0/128 false identifications across four mixture ratios (100%-0% to 25%-75% target:non-target). Media and colony stability: 0 false identifications across 4 media types tested up to 12 hours post-incubation.
